message:
fix(security): fail-closed policy continuity in isolation rail elevation

When a workload with active policy rules attempts elevation to a target rail
that has no policy definition, the policy continuity check was silently skipped
via an if-let pattern match failure. This allowed workloads to lose all their
policy rules during elevation. Now fails closed with PolicyBreak error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
